intro: Our kitchen draws from the Italian culinary tradition, blending it with Thai, Indian, and continental flavours. Many of our ingredients come straight from our chemical-free garden, and our coffees and teas are sourced from the neighbouring estates.

items.name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
items.description: Garden tomatoes, fresh basil, garlic on toasted ciabatta

items.name: Thai Coconut Soup
items.description: Creamy coconut broth with lemongrass, galangal, and garden vegetables

items.name: Garden Salad
items.description: Seasonal greens, herbs, and edible flowers from our garden with house vinaigrette

items.name: Pasta al Pesto
items.description: Fresh pasta with garden basil pesto, pine nuts, and parmesan

items.name: Chicken Thyolo
items.description: Free-range chicken with Malawian spices, served with seasonal vegetables

items.name: Fish of the Day
items.description: Lake Malawi chambo or local catch, prepared Italian style

items.name: Vegetable Curry
items.description: Garden vegetables in a fragrant Indian-inspired curry with basmati rice

items.name: Tiramisu
items.description: Classic Italian tiramisu with Thyolo estate coffee

items.name: Tropical Fruit Platter
items.description: Seasonal Malawian fruits — mango, papaya, passion fruit

items.name: Estate Tea Selection
items.description: Black, green, and specialty teas from neighbouring Conforzi and Satemwa estates

items.name: Fresh Juice
items.description: Seasonal fruit juice — mango, passion fruit, or citrus

items.name: Cocktails
items.description: Signature cocktails crafted with local spirits and garden botanicals
